description: Legal query in Judaeo-Arabic. Likely the hand of Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi, in which case the addressee is likely either Moshe Maimonides or Avraham Maimonides. Regarding a quarter of a house given as a gift at the time of a marriage and then 10 years later a situation involving a mortgage and using his wife's property for redeeming it. On recto there is piyyuṭ for Passover. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: שאלה משפטית ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
